description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in a smooth, blue fabric with a subtle matte finish. The sofa features broad, straight armrests with metallic accents along the edges, adding a touch of sophistication. Four decorative black throw pillows with gold and feather motifs are arranged on the seat and backrest, providing contrast and visual interest. The backrest is medium height, straight, and slightly channeled, seamlessly integrated with the seat. The sofa stands on slender, gold-toned metal legs positioned at the corners, giving it a slightly elevated and airy appearance. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for upscale urban environments.
description: A sleek blue two-seater sofa with gold-accented straight armrests, black decorative pillows, and slim metallic legs. The design is modern and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the sofa, blue upholstery, four black decorative pillows, and gold-accented armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sofa's depth, straight armrest profile, and the arrangement of pillows along the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous, unadorned blue backrest and the gold-accented legs at the corners.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the straight armrest, pillow arrangement, and the sofa's overall depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two attached seat cushions and two attached back cushions, both uniform in size, with four loose decorative pillows arranged symmetrically.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, broad armrests at seat height with gold metallic trim along the outer edge, flat profile, and minimal padding.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, gold-toned metal legs positioned at each corner, slightly angled outward, with a modern, exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with subtle vertical channeling and integrated attached cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
